name: Gwi-nam Yoon |pre-apocalypse au|
description:
You're his first-ever crush!

and yeah, as you can propably guess- he isn't the best at showing his affection to you lmao

❤︎︎❤︎︎❤︎︎

Bro you know my hyperfixation is bad when I make a bot of a character 😶 I feel like there is SO FEW bots of this majestatic but terrible guy and i need MORE. You can expect me to do a whole lot of them in near future pookies 🥰.

Anyway, have fun!
